citations.quote: The accommodation support service can: • Offer advice and information on finding a flat in the private sector • Set up flat viewings by calling estate agents on your behalf • Provide a dedicated member of staff to provide information and to answer any related queries, or signpost you to a person or service to help you further

ENSA Advice … free, confidential and independent welfare rights and education advice service run by Edinburgh Napier Students’ Association. … Advice on how to find accommodation … Look over leases and tenancy agreements … Advice on tenant rights and responsibilities … Help with disputes

findings.text: The Private Accommodation Brochure 2025 describes a Private Accommodation Support Service and ENSA Advice that offer accommodation-finding help, lease review, and tenant rights advice.
No email or case note sources were provided in this work order; therefore no records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal could be reviewed.
Task scope requires email and case note sources, but only a single brochure source (NAP-SRC-0014) was supplied. The brochure does not contain individual service records.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Evidence Map: Brochure Provision / Support Service Access by Anfal

**Source Reviewed:** NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025)

**Findings:**
- The brochure describes the Private Accommodation Support Service (privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk) and ENSA Advice (0131 229 8791 / ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk).
- No individual records, emails, or case notes were provided.
- No evidence of brochure provision to Anfal or Anfal's access to support services was found.

**Gap:** Email and case note sources are required to determine whether Anfal received the brochure or accessed support.
proposed_artifacts.title: Evidence Map for Brochure Provision / Support Service Access by Anfal

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search the matter's email and case note sources (e.g., NAP-EMAIL-*, NAP-CASE-*) for any records indicating that Anfal was provided with the Private Accommodation Brochure 2025 or accessed the Private Accommodation Support Service or ENSA Advice. Report any relevant communications, referrals, or service notes.
proposed_tasks.title: Search email and case note records for brochure provision or support service access by Anfal

risk_flags.description: No email or case note sources were included in the work order; the task cannot be completed as specified without those sources.

summary: Task requested search of email and case note sources for records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal. Only source NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025) was provided; no email or case note sources were included. The brochure describes the Private Accommodation Support Service and ENSA Advice but contains no records of provision to any individual. No evidence of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal was found. A follow-up task is proposed to search actual email and case note records.

uncertainties.description: Whether Anfal was ever provided with the Private Accommodation Brochure or accessed the support services described in it cannot be determined from the available source material.
